title: Leaders in inclusive workplaces recognize Ameren for disability inclusion
text: Company again received a top score on the Disability Equality Index ST. LOUIS , July 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- For the eighth year in a row, Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) has earned a 100 score on the Disability Equality Index, recognizing its programs and policies that promote inclusion for Ameren employees, customers and suppliers with disabilities.

title: Local organizations join Ameren Missouri in leading clean energy transformation
text: New partnerships to benefit all customers ST. LOUIS , July 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, a group of leading organizations from across Missouri announced they're joining Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), to bring more clean energy to the state.

title: Ameren Corporation Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast Aug. 5, 2022
text: ST. LOUIS , July 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Martin J. Lyons Jr., president and CEO of Ameren Corp. (NYSE: AEE) and Michael L.

title: Ameren: Strong Growth Prospects And Attractive Valuation
text: Ameren serves customers in east Missouri and most of Illinois, providing both natural gas and electric utility service. The company is positioned to grow its earnings per share at a 6% to 8% rate over the next five years, which should reward investors with a 10% total return.
